Cariyāpiṭakaṭṭhakathā/X/X/1.text: Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 96; Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 143; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 14; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 239; Khuddakapāṭha-Ṭṭha 97 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Cariyāpiṭakaṭṭhakathā/X/X/45.text: Yā devatā idhāgatā, yāni ca yakkhabhūtabhabyāni. Saraṇesiniṁ anāthaṁ tāyatha maṁ, yācāmahaṁ patimāhaṁ ajeyyanti. (Khu 6. 255 piṭṭhe)
